settings.text: 5 Golfzon indoor simulator bays — play world-famous courses, track your stats, and improve your game year-round.

settings.title: Golfzon Vision Technology
settings.text: Ultra-realistic ball tracking and course simulation with slope detection, wind, and pin placement accuracy.

settings.title: 200+ World Courses
settings.text: Play Augusta, Pebble Beach, St Andrews, and over 200 other world-famous courses without leaving Atlanta.

settings.title: Swing Analysis
settings.text: Every shot tracked with launch angle, ball speed, spin rate, and club path data. Improve faster with data-backed feedback.

settings.title: Open Rain or Shine
settings.text: Unlike the range, simulators run no matter the weather. Perfect for winter practice or late-night sessions.
